name: DynaVap - DynaMag
summary: The DynaMag from DynaVap is perfect for those who are prone to dropping their units.
description: The DynaMag from DynaVap is perfect for those who are prone to dropping their units. This high-quality, powerful magnet securely holds your VapCap in place, providing peace of mind and preventing any mishaps. Stay stress-free with the simple yet effective DynaMag. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
